# clusteringIdentifier

**Interface Property**

An identifier for grouping annotations into the same cluster.

## Declaration

```swift
clusteringIdentifier?: string | null;
```

## Discussion

When zooming out on a map that contains many annotations, MapKit JS groups the colliding annotations based on a clustering identifier value.

The default value is `null`.

For more information, see [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/clustering-annotations].

## Grouping annotations

- **collisionMode**: A mode that determines the shape of the collision frame.
- **id**: A Place ID that uniquely identifies a feature.
